name: Macaroni Cones
recipeInstructions:
Special equipment: Pie fluter (optional); cellophane-tipped toothpicks.
1. Combine the macaroni salad and croutons.
2. Separate the cheese slices.
3. If desired, flute the edges of the cheese with the pie fluter.
4. Place approximately 1 to 1 1/2 teaspoons of the macaroni-crouton filling on each slice, ensuring enough room for folding the cheese.
5. Shape the filling into a line along the length of each cheese slice.
6. Roll the cheese into a cone shape and secure with a cellophane-tipped toothpick.
7. Refrigerate until serving time.
Special Hints:
For an elegant finish, trim the edges of the cheese slices using the pie fluter. This takes very little time and adds visual interest.
To prepare the macaroni salad ahead of time, omit the croutons. Add them just before shaping the cones to ensure a crunchy texture.
